{{Quote|One less Imperial is no tragedy. Come now, or you'll miss your own celebration.|General Se'lab to [[Sayer Mon Neela]] on the fate of [[Sergus Lanox|Captain Sergus Lanox]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''</ref>}}
'''Polo Se'lab''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] junior [[Senator/Legends|senator]] who represented the [[Bothan Space/Legends|Bothan sector]] in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic]] and [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senates]].

==Biography==
[[File:PoloSelab-Journal10.jpg|thumb|left|180px|General Se'lab]]
Before the election of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] to [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]], he formed a friendship with [[Sayer Mon Neela]]. Just prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] he consistently abstained from politically charged Senate votes. He refused to make Bothawui involved in the start of any open warfare, and the senator supported Bothan neutrality throughout the Clone Wars.

During the time of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], he joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] after his wife was killed by an Imperial attack on a [[Bothan Spynet/Legends|Bothan Spynet]] post. He was made commander of Alliance forces on [[Carosi XII]], where he was reunited with his friend, Neela.
